<div style="text-align: center;">

<img src="images/acs_headshot.Monday0372.png" style="width: 300px; margin-bottom: 16px;">

### Kenneth Acosta, PhD
Life Scientist

<div class="about-icons">

[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5309-2760)
[{{< fa brands google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=bIc4J-YAAAAJ&hl=en)
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/kenscripts)
[{{< fa brands researchgate >}}](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Kenneth-Acosta)
[{{< fa solid database >}}](https://figshare.com/authors/Kenneth_Acosta/11859935)

</div>

<div class="about-links">
<a href="mailto:ikennethacosta@gmail.com">Email</a>
<span style="maring: 0 10px;">|</span>
<a href="pdf/CV-2026.pdf">CV</a>
</div>

</div>
